chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Eclipses, Earthquakes, Winds, and Oppression and Their Causes

text: 1508 - وَ اِنْكَسَفَتِ اَلشَّمْسُ عَلَى عَهْدِ أَمِيرِ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَصَلَّى بِهِمْ حَتَّى كَانَ اَلرَّجُلُ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى اَلرَّجُلِ قَدِ اِبْتَلَّتْ قَدَمُهُ مِنْ عَرَقِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1508 - The sun was eclipsed during the time of Amir al-Mu'minin (as), and he led the people in prayer until a man could see another man whose feet were soaked with sweat.
